news.title: Investors Should Go Long India’s 30-Year Government Bonds
news.summary: 0156 GMT — Investors should go long India’s 30-year government bonds, based on three factors, four members of  Goldman Sachs’s  economics research say in a report.  First, the impact on India from higher energy and fertilizer prices has been less than initially feared and the macro outlook is improving further with the interim U.S.-Iran deal, the members say.  Third, India’s inclusion in the Bloomberg Global Aggregate Index seems likely.
